get.description:
- display courses of the authenticated instructor .
- authenticated:
  - instructor
  - admin

reason.example: Course content does not meet quality requirements.

200.description: Full course content with section and lesson references
A paginated list of course reviews.

order.description: New order of the section within the course (0-based index)

structure.description: Resulting course structure after moving the section, including all sections and their lessons

targetSectionId.description: The ID of the section to move the lesson into. Use the current sectionId if only reordering.

order.description: The new 0-based position of the lesson within the target section.

searchQuery.name: query
searchQuery.description: Search query to filter courses by title or description

reviewIdPath.name: reviewId
reviewIdPath.description: Unique identifier of the course review

ratingQuery.name: rating
ratingQuery.description: Filter reviews by a specific rating (1-5)

commentIdPath.name: commentId
commentIdPath.description: Unique identifier of the post comment

properties-id.description: User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

more_info.description: URL with more information about the error

hasNext.description: Whether there is a next page

hasPrev.description: Whether there is a previous page
